292.issue_title: Workflow state mutations can lose updates under concurrent transitions

cycles.name: C1 — PSE transformer lambda migration

deliverables.description: All 8 former callers use _workflow_state_mutator.apply() with correct transformer lambda
Existing PSE unit tests pass; mock assertions updated to inline lambda shape

cycles.exit_criteria: _apply_state() deleted; all 8 callers use inline transformer lambdas; existing PSE unit tests green; mypy + ruff clean; quality gates green

cycles.name: C2 — _save_state() removal and test migration

deliverables.description: 9 Category A fixture sites migrated to IStateRepository injection (test_cycle_tools_legacy.py x7, test_discovery_tools.py x2)
2 Category B tests deleted (test_phase_state_engine_async.py L63, L106)
Full test suite passes; mypy + ruff clean on changed test files

cycles.exit_criteria: _save_state() deleted; all 9 Category A sites inject via IStateRepository; 2 Category B deleted; full suite green; quality gates green

cycles.name: C3 — FileQualityStateRepository lock

deliverables.description: FileQualityStateRepository.apply() acquires threading.Lock (5s timeout) before read-apply-write
New lock-contention unit test passes; new timeout unit test passes
IQualityStateRepository protocol unchanged; existing tests green; mypy + ruff clean on quality_state_repository.py
RunQualityGatesTool.execute() catches QualityStateMutationConflictError and returns RecoveryNote(message=e.recovery) + ToolResult.error(e.diagnostic)
New test: QualityStateMutationConflictError raised by manager -> RecoveryNote produced + ToolResult.error returned (test_quality_tools.py); mypy + ruff clean on quality_tools.py

cycles.exit_criteria: Lock in place; QualityStateMutationConflictError raised on timeout; IQualityStateRepository unchanged; new unit tests pass; existing tests green; quality gates green

cycles.name: C4 — Concurrent regression tests

deliverables.description: Primary concurrent regression test: force_transition() + force_cycle_transition() concurrent — neither mutation lost
Secondary concurrent regression test: two concurrent force_transition() calls — both records present
Full test suite passes; quality gates green

cycles.exit_criteria: Primary proof (mixed writers) passes; secondary proof (homogeneous writers) passes; full suite green; quality gates green
